shell_spike.sidecar_packaging: Tauri externalBin points at the app-managed desktop host launcher; packaging verifies the generated wrapper, bundled Node, runtime dependencies, and optional app-managed CLI resources that are not used for Studio mutations.
shell_spike.webview_smoke: P3.1/P3.2 must run WKWebView smoke after the Tauri shell loads built React assets from the cookie-authenticated no-query App Server URL.
shell_spike.electron_fallback_threshold: Switch only on a verified blocker: WebView API gap, native UI-process module requirement, unacceptable sidecar packaging/signing/notarization/update cost, or lifecycle reliability that would require protocol logic in Rust.

agent_integrations.command_line_tool: Optional Install Command Line Tool writes a user-confirmed PATH wrapper to the app-managed CLI entrypoint after showing any existing PATH command.
agent_integrations.skill_install: Optional Install Agent Skill writes only user-selected targets and verifies each target independently.
